description: Assign apertures to fractures. Apertures can be used during contact model assignment (with the fracture contact-model command), for connectivity distance calculations (with the fracture connectivity command) and with the DFN range element.

keywords.name: constant
keywords.description: Constant aperture with f >0.

keywords.name: dfn
keywords.description: Limit aperture assignment to the DFN with provided name.

keywords.name: fish
keywords.description: Apertures are assigned via the user-defined FISH function s with arguments . This function is called for each fracture and must return a floating point value corresponding to the fracture aperture.

keywords.name: gauss
keywords.description: Draw apertures randomly from a Gaussian distribution with mean fm and standard deviation fs .

keywords.name: limits
keywords.description: Apertures fall within the range [ fmin , fmax ], where fmax is greater than or equal to fmin . By default, fmin = 0 and fmax = +∞.

keywords.name: log-normal
keywords.description: Draw apertures randomly from a log-normal distribution with mean fm and standard deviation fs .

keywords.name: power-law
keywords.description: Draw apertures randomly from a negative power-law distribution with exponent f .

keywords.name: uniform
keywords.description: Draw apertures randomly from a uniform distribution within the given limits as defined by the limit keyword.
